use_cases: Add animated gradient lines to hero sections for visual appeal
Create moving dividers or separators between page sections
Enhance button or link borders with animated gradient effects
Decorate backgrounds with flowing gradient light trails
Add eye-catching motion to landing page and marketing sites
ai_summary: A lightweight React component that renders an animated SVG path with a gradient that smoothly traces across it using Framer Motion. The gradient effect creates a luminous, flowing line that cycles continuously, making it ideal for adding subtle motion accents to UI elements, section dividers, or decorative backgrounds in SaaS and media applications.
